material_system.surface: wet river wood, iron grime, steam condensation
material_system.reflectance: low on wood, dull on iron, white steam glow only as haze
material_system.wear_rules: water tide marks, oil black smears, rope stains, softened edges
material_system.usage: 金河粮磨、水泵、码头、粮仓生产线

material_system.surface: bone, dull iron, hide, fur, rope and blood-salt wear
material_system.reflectance: very low except worn iron scratches
material_system.wear_rules: stitched repairs, bite marks, salt bloom, cracked leather, bone polish at grip points
material_system.usage: 北境盾鼓、皮帐、兽具、骨笛、攻城兵种

material_system.surface: charred paper, ash dust, cracked copper, brittle seal fragments
material_system.reflectance: copper has dull broken glints only
material_system.wear_rules: burnt edges, ash transfer, copper verdigris, moon-white dust on ridges
material_system.usage: 灰烬书院、碎星图、封条、禁书残页

material_system.reflectance: none except damp darker patches
material_system.wear_rules: frayed seams, patched elbows, herb-powder smears, soot on corners

material_system.surface: old raised metal with exposed warm gold on edges only

material_system.wear_rules: edge wear, blackened recesses, cracked enamel, missing flakes

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建核心材质触感板，作为全剧共享视觉规则参考板。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；竖屏短剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 风格板可展示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得把色名、编号、说明文字或界面标签画进画面。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 核心材质触感板，虫蜡白、旧白石、黑石雪线、湿木蒸汽、骨铁兽皮、纸灰裂铜、草药布料和磨损金以近景纹理与中景应用并列，强调可触摸的古代材料。核心视觉锚点：虫蜡白、旧白石、黑石雪线、湿木蒸汽、骨铁兽皮、纸灰裂铜、磨损金。应用范围：资产生成材质基准
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 9:16 style reference board。使用分区版式展示色彩关系、材质样片、构图缩略、光效边界、正确方向与禁用方向；信息清晰但不做图文海报，画面中不得出现可读标签或编号。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：避免塑料 CGI、过度干净、现代工业纹理或单纯滤镜化；材质必须服务剧情空间。风格板可以显示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得显示可读标签、色名、编号、界面元素或说明文字。若涉及徽章、旗帜、印章或文字痕迹，只展示抽象承载物和材质示例；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要图文海报、可读标签、色号、网格编号、现代 UI、现代设计稿界面、纯滤镜化、单一灰冷逃亡色、喜剧化、爽剧化、高魔法化。

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: palette, material, lighting, low-magic, and composition example swatches
composition_layers.midground: continuity rules, allowed examples, prohibited examples, and downstream application notes
composition_layers.background: designed neutral style-board canvas without video-frame staging

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
style rules are concrete enough to guide downstream cards
does not contain ComfyUI node or sampler parameters
style_reference_data.color_palette or equivalent style tokens are represented as visual swatches or material samples without readable labels
material_system, lighting_rules, faction_symbol_systems, composition_templates, or light_tokens are followed where present for this board
no HEX codes, token IDs, color names, captions, grid numbers, or UI text are rendered into the image

material_system.surface: smooth wax-sealed institutional surface with faint cloudy translucency
material_system.reflectance: soft waxy highlights, no glossy plastic
material_system.wear_rules: sealed seams, pressed black-sun marks, needle scratches, dustless violence
material_system.usage: 清明院墙面、封条、记忆针、白册章

material_system.surface: coarse black stone with snow packed into cracks
material_system.reflectance: very low, wet edge glints only
material_system.wear_rules: frost cracks, wind-polished corners, dry blood in cuts, snow accumulation on ledges
material_system.usage: 边墙、锁喉关、寒鸦堡、绝境山脉

material_system.surface: wet river wood, iron grime, steam condensation
material_system.reflectance: low on wood, dull on iron, white steam glow only as haze
material_system.wear_rules: water tide marks, oil black smears, rope stains, softened edges
material_system.usage: 金河粮磨、水泵、码头、粮仓生产线

material_system.surface: bone, dull iron, hide, fur, rope and blood-salt wear
material_system.reflectance: very low except worn iron scratches
material_system.wear_rules: stitched repairs, bite marks, salt bloom, cracked leather, bone polish at grip points
material_system.usage: 北境盾鼓、皮帐、兽具、骨笛、攻城兵种

material_system.surface: charred paper, ash dust, cracked copper, brittle seal fragments
material_system.reflectance: copper has dull broken glints only
material_system.wear_rules: burnt edges, ash transfer, copper verdigris, moon-white dust on ridges
material_system.usage: 灰烬书院、碎星图、封条、禁书残页

material_system.surface: rough linen with herb stains, sweat, smoke and field dust
material_system.reflectance: none except damp darker patches
material_system.wear_rules: frayed seams, patched elbows, herb-powder smears, soot on corners
material_system.usage: 猎户、药户、山路护送、旧驿后裔服装

material_system.surface: old raised metal with exposed warm gold on edges only
material_system.reflectance: muted glint on raised cuts, no polished palace shine
material_system.wear_rules: edge wear, blackened recesses, cracked enamel, missing flakes
material_system.usage: 昭明令牌、旧帝国遗迹、日月残纹、盟书印记

material_system.surface: porous old imperial stone with chips, dust and old carving scars
material_system.reflectance: chalky low reflectance
material_system.wear_rules: corner chips, soot in carved lines, snow or dust settled in cuts
material_system.usage: 白曜旧都、旧驿、月下盟书石台

model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；竖屏短剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 风格板可展示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得把色名、编号、说明文字或界面标签画进画面。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 势力符号与禁用标志板，必须以三势力根徽章旗帜为根参考，展示昭明、肃明、北境如何延展到材质、服饰、遗迹、封条、旗布和道具；灰墙军和墙下混裔只做物件化标记，不新增国家徽章。核心视觉锚点：昭明日月星盘根徽章旗帜、肃明黑日白翅根徽章旗帜、北境骨木万兽根徽章旗帜、灰墙军旧甲压痕、墙下无籍交易牌。应用范围：徽记和符号后合成策略
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 9:16 style reference board。使用分区版式展示色彩关系、材质样片、构图缩略、光效边界、正确方向与禁用方向；信息清晰但不做图文海报，画面中不得出现可读标签或编号。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity: 硬锁：不得重做三势力根徽章；精确符号必须线控或透明图层后合成；不得生成新北境单一动物徽章、现代 logo、水印或乱码文字。风格板可以显示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得显示可读标签、色名、编号、界面元素或说明文字。三势力符号只展示已批准根系统的材质、尺度、磨损、遮挡和派生位置；不得重新发明新国家徽章、现代 logo、水印或乱码文字。精确符号必须线控或透明图层后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要图文海报、可读标签、色号、网格编号、现代 UI、现代设计稿界面、纯滤镜化、单一灰冷逃亡色、喜剧化、爽剧化、高魔法化。

composition_templates.rule: fire is local cause, not full-screen spectacle

composition_templates.key_readable_area: prop and fingers occupy 18-24% frame height
composition_templates.rule: story prop readable before beauty shot

composition_templates.key_readable_area: bell or bone object in lower-mid third, vibration debris around contact point
composition_templates.rule: sound and vibration shown by local contact cause

composition_templates.key_readable_area: horn/silhouette enters from edge 20-35% width, humans small but not unreadable
composition_templates.rule: show scale through partial body and impact, not full monster splash

composition_templates.key_readable_area: needle/wax/contact patch 20-28% height near upper or center third
hand, cracked stair edge and falling debris form diagonal from lower third to upper third
composition_templates.rule: action consequence must be visible in contact point

composition_templates.key_readable_area: body path diagonal 60-75% frame height with snow spray at feet/hands
composition_templates.rule: weight and friction visible; no floating slow motion

copy_ready.positive_prompt:
创建9比16竖屏构图与动作因果板，作为全剧共享视觉规则参考板。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；竖屏短剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 风格板可展示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得把色名、编号、说明文字或界面标签画进画面。

9比16竖屏构图与动作因果板，展示门缝火光、粮牌手部、骨钟震动、巨兽角影、虫蜡针近景、断阶抓手和雪坡逃亡等短剧竖屏可读构图。核心视觉锚点：9:16、3-8秒片段、真实重心、局部因果、道具首秒可读。应用范围：短剧镜头资产构图参考

9:16 style reference board。使用分区版式展示色彩关系、材质样片、构图缩略、光效边界、正确方向与禁用方向；信息清晰但不做图文海报，画面中不得出现可读标签或编号。

硬锁：道具信息第一秒可读，火、烟、蒸汽、雪、坍塌和攻城都用局部因果，不用满屏奇观。风格板可以显示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得显示可读标签、色名、编号、界面元素或说明文字。若涉及徽章、旗帜、印章或文字痕迹，只展示抽象承载物和材质示例；精确符号留给线控、遮罩、透明 PNG/SVG 或后合成。生成时使用随附参考图作为硬参考。
copy_ready.negative_prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要图文海报、可读标签、色号、网格编号、现代 UI、现代设计稿界面、纯滤镜化、单一灰冷逃亡色、喜剧化、爽剧化、高魔法化。

composition_layers.background: designed neutral style-board canvas without video-frame staging

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
style rules are concrete enough to guide downstream cards
does not contain ComfyUI node or sampler parameters

material_system, lighting_rules, faction_symbol_systems, composition_templates, or light_tokens are followed where present for this board
no HEX codes, token IDs, color names, captions, grid numbers, or UI text are rendered into the image

style_reference_data.palette_display_policy: Render composition thumbnails and prop/hand/silhouette blocks visually; do not render labels, grids, numbers, or captions.

color_palette.usage: 边墙、寒鸦堡、锁喉关、黑石山口
雪线、冻风、山口高光、北境远景

金河、渡口、蒸汽生产线、湿木阴影

灰烬书院、旧纸、焦黑书架尘面

composition_templates.rule: fire is local cause, not full-screen spectacle

composition_templates.key_readable_area: prop and fingers occupy 18-24% frame height
composition_templates.rule: story prop readable before beauty shot

composition_templates.key_readable_area: bell or bone object in lower-mid third, vibration debris around contact point
composition_templates.rule: sound and vibration shown by local contact cause

composition_templates.key_readable_area: horn/silhouette enters from edge 20-35% width, humans small but not unreadable
composition_templates.rule: show scale through partial body and impact, not full monster splash

composition_templates.key_readable_area: needle/wax/contact patch 20-28% height near upper or center third
hand, cracked stair edge and falling debris form diagonal from lower third to upper third
composition_templates.rule: action consequence must be visible in contact point

composition_templates.key_readable_area: body path diagonal 60-75% frame height with snow spray at feet/hands
composition_templates.rule: weight and friction visible; no floating slow motion

usage: 低魔效果边界参考

no magic solution replacing physical action

参考图执行规则：生成时请同时上传或引用本资产记录列出的已批准参考图、控制图或线控层。参考图负责锁定上游风格、角色、材质、地域、符号和尺度一致性；模型可见提示只描述当前资产，不要随机发明精确徽章、旗帜、印章、符号或可读文字。

Negative prompt: 不要现代物件、现代 logo、水印、UI、可读文字、乱码、枪械、科幻装备、塑料 CG、过度磨皮、单一灰冷滤镜、漂浮慢动作、无重量姿态、随机精确徽章、随机旗帜、随机印章、随机符号或随机文字。 不要图文海报、可读标签、色号、网格编号、现代 UI、现代设计稿界面、纯滤镜化、单一灰冷逃亡色、喜剧化、爽剧化、高魔法化。
copy_ready.gemini_image_prompt:
Create a cinematic production asset reference card using this Chinese six-section prompt. Use all supplied approved reference images/control layers when provided, and do not invent precise symbols or readable text.

创建低魔显化与旧驿金赤光规则板，作为全剧共享视觉规则参考板。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；竖屏短剧可读；真实身体重量、自然光、旧文明断代感和可触摸材料优先。避免塑料感、现代感、游戏化装备、过度干净和高魔法光污染。 风格板可展示色块、材质样片、构图缩略和光效样片，但不得把色名、编号、说明文字或界面标签画进画面。

低魔显化规则板，肩胛、脊柱、手腕或眼角的灵翼纹路、旧驿局部金赤路线光、日月残纹、石刻短促反应和记忆残留动作并列，光效贴近材质表面。核心视觉锚点：灵翼残纹、旧驿共鸣、金赤路线光、日月残纹、记忆残留。应用范围：低魔效果边界参考

output_format.alpha_policy_notes: forbidden

composition_layers.foreground: palette, material, lighting, low-magic, and composition example swatches
composition_layers.midground: continuity rules, allowed examples, prohibited examples, and downstream application notes
composition_layers.background: designed neutral style-board canvas without video-frame staging

qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
style rules are concrete enough to guide downstream cards
does not contain ComfyUI node or sampler parameters
style_reference_data.color_palette or equivalent style tokens are represented as visual swatches or material samples without readable labels
material_system, lighting_rules, faction_symbol_systems, composition_templates, or light_tokens are followed where present for this board
no HEX codes, token IDs, color names, captions, grid numbers, or UI text are rendered into the image

style_reference_data.palette_display_policy: Render light as local glow samples on skin, cloth, stone and route marks; do not render labels, runic text, UI, or hex codes.

color_palette.usage: 旧驿路线光、日月残纹、短促低魔显化
旧昭明金属边、令牌、磨损凸纹
昭明旗布、旧帝国残纹、遗迹红边
白曜旧都、旧驿白石、月下旧驿石台
边墙、寒鸦堡、锁喉关、黑石山口
灰烬书院、旧纸、焦黑书架尘面
清明院白墙、虫蜡封条、记忆室、白册工具
旧驿残光熄灭边缘
路线光最亮边缘，只可局部出现

light_tokens.rule: 贴着皮肤和衣料裂纹出现，不形成大翅膀
局部路线反应，不照亮整场

light_tokens.duration_hint: still image only or short glint
light_tokens.rule: 旧债感和磨损金，不是神圣胜利光
只证明旧驿仍有残响，不解决危机

forbidden_magic_rules: no neon blue-violet fantasy spell flood
no magic solution replacing physical action
